name: Shopware
description: PHP/Symfony e-commerce platform with REST/GraphQL Store APIs and App SDK.

seo.title: Shopware — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Shopware: PHP/Symfony e-commerce platform with REST/GraphQL Store APIs and App SDK.

when_to_use: Custom e-commerce extension built with Shopware App SDK
REST/GraphQL storefront connected to a headless frontend
PHP-based e-commerce platform with Symfony architecture
German SME e-commerce store with composable plugin ecosystem
B2B commerce platform with Shopware's catalog APIs

pros: REST and GraphQL Store APIs are solid
App SDK enables real marketplace extensions
cons: PHP hosting overhead vs Shopify SaaS
Pricing unclear between CE and commercial
review.verdict: Respectable Shopify alternative for European B2B, though running PHP commerce in 2026 is its own commitment.
review.best_for: DACH-region mid-market B2B merchants with agency support and self-host needs
review.not_for: Teams who want SaaS simplicity without managing PHP infrastructure

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
